**From:** Gov. John Kasich
**To:** Peter
**Date:** July 28, 2018

It has been a whirlwind of news headlines lately - mostly focusing on America's foreign policy stumbles and actions that threaten our international alliances.

The world looks to America for leadership and to push back against Russia's dishonest and harmful actions.

**Nations that attack our elections, poison and kill political opponents, invade other countries and constantly look for ways to undermine our western values, are simply not our allies**.

This is why I've continued to implore our leaders in Congress to take REAL action...not just post more tweets.

**So why am I sending you this email?** It's partially to thank you for continuing to be interested in our email updates and hopefully for your actions to help share this message.

It's also because of the reality that we need to continue raising funds to pay for these tools and our other programs for rallying support for real change.

[**We have a critical July deadline in just a few days**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=810ac687c4194b00b87db4e42bb48e2a&_e=xGoM2mcQI5aCY55YMBIth0g8ClcXbiNdyf1m8MyUUNBOaOQE021aYz9mW4uSy9SNgfq1W8v7zOxowJ0Glo0RHbFKP0aarfYZT9--8biF3aXY_ibh8emiXbHRUNGZ9cwNKb8_dSWCLBH8-IuTVYPb1uggrb5nfuDOjunVL6lwsvcATAyF0ebwcQFOhlpL-ai34utb3j69eO7PL97WMsGvBRssUL1NS1jBe06qb4_XOKU9tMz7dZxemCzriKp22Hi3JWL2L8Ty7ITZxsf7x__6Ew%3D%3D) and I've challenged our team to raise another $10,000 before August 1st to hit our goal.

[**Whether it's $5, $50 or $500, please consider chipping in whatever you can to help**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=810ac687c4194b00b87db4e42bb48e2a&_e=xGoM2mcQI5aCY55YMBIth0g8ClcXbiNdyf1m8MyUUNBOaOQE021aYz9mW4uSy9SNcjHCkMhRdu8tN74xNTE3JM6vO9O4CYrFZlI2cpPs6GV1hV6pt_Y5rW66PjNxix6WtWgJhVdXZxCZneeEBTu8EewjgvsUzN3X5IMZ1nRvqjkJ7M9FVgYqg80TkO8ijSSI2WUCL7HSFwPVWdt_FrPD0-ov4SYvxOctanog2ar4ooWoUq0WzbOoZseCGj_SkO5DzwNmIjyvwsKfEp-i0OurPQ%3D%3D).

Thank you for all that you're doing.

-John

[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e602b/51dbcc2a/181d7001/3a684e8/216477676/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team -- the end of month deadline is at midnight tonight, and Bob needs your help.

With President Trump coming to Pennsylvania in two days, we need to be ready. Trump is headlining a huge rally on Thursday for Congressman Lou Barletta, his hand-picked candidate for Pennsylvania's Senate seat. He's already spent thousands of dollars on ads to promote the event, so you know he's expecting a huge crowd. Trump wants to flip this seat and gain another ally in the Senate to push his disastrous, right-wing agenda, and with a Supreme Court nominee on the line, we can't let that happen.

**_[The fundraising deadline is midnight tonight, and we are still $4,390 away from our goal. Can you rush $5 or more to help close the gap and protect Bob?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180731_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Trump has made it clear what he thinks about Bob Casey: he has attacked him on stage at an NRA rally and has repeatedly called him out on Twitter. The path to a Democratic Congressional majority runs right through PA, so we need to be prepared for the president to continue to be directly involved in this race.

**Trump will be in PA on Thursday, and we can count on him coming after Bob again. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: It starts with August 28th
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37a5/9e00690/5820e230/2402e4ca/307693835/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180731_EOM5_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180731_EOM5_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx")
Friends,

On August 28, 1963, Martin Luther King Jr. stood at the foot of the Lincoln Memorial in Washington D.C. to deliver his historic "I Have a Dream" speech.

On August 28, 2008, Barack Obama stood on-stage in Denver and accepted the Democratic nomination for President of the United States.

On August 28th, my name will be on ballots across Florida to be our next Governor. And I have to admit, it makes me a little emotional to think about. I was the first in my immediate family to graduate college, I became the youngest City Commissioner of Tallahassee, and I eventually became the Mayor of the Capital City.

On August 28, 2018, we also have the opportunity to make history together again. And it's not just my name on the ballot that feels surreal to me -- it's everything this campaign represents.

I'm running for Governor for anyone who has ever been told that they can't do something, or told that they don't belong, or told they're just not good enough. You've helped grow this grassroots movement from the ground up, and this is our chance to take a seat at the table.

Friend, it's time to give people something to vote FOR, not just against. And from my plans to enact common-sense gun reform to giving our teachers a raise and properly funding our public education, I have the bold progressive agenda that will get voters to the polls.

We have the chance to take back the Governor's mansion after 20-years of Republican control -- and it all starts with who we elect to represent us on August 28th.

Our final primary end-of-month deadline will hit in just a few hours, and I need your help now more than ever. **[When you make a contribution, it will be tripled to make your impact even larger. Are you with me to make history? Chip in today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37a5/9e00690/5820e230/2402e4cd/307693835/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2486&refcode=em18_180731_EOM5_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180731_EOM5_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+When+you+make+a+contribution+it+will+be+")**

Bring it home,

Andrew

clean_body: "" Friends, On August 28, 1963, Martin Luther King Jr. stood at the foot of the Lincoln Memorial in Washington D.C. to deliver his historic "I Have a Dream" speech. On August 28, 2008, Barack Obama stood on-stage in Denver and accepted the Democratic nomination for President of the United States. On August 28th, my name will be on ballots across Florida to be our next Governor. And I have to admit, it makes me a little emotional to think about. I was the first in my immediate family to graduate college, I became the youngest City Commissioner of Tallahassee, and I eventually became the Mayor of the Capital City. On August 28, 2018, we also have the opportunity to make history together again. And it's not just my name on the ballot that feels surreal to me -- it's everything this campaign represents. I'm running for Governor for anyone who has ever been told that they can't do something, or told that they don't belong, or told they're just not good enough. You've helped grow this grassroots movement from the ground up, and this is our chance to take a seat at the table. Friend, it's time to give people something to vote FOR, not just against. And from my plans to enact common-sense gun reform to giving our teachers a raise and properly funding our public education, I have the bold progressive agenda that will get voters to the polls. We have the chance to take back the Governor's mansion after 20-years of Republican control -- and it all starts with who we elect to represent us on August 28th. Our final primary end-of-month deadline will hit in just a few hours, and I need your help now more than ever. "+" Bring it home, Andrew "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 1550 Melvin Street, Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Only a few hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Only a few hours to go before this major deadline.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd784d3/2f5ea88d/76cdad91/2cbc38ed/2195223709/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-8-9pm&refcode=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-8-9pm&utm_campaign=july-eom-8-9pm&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, We only have 3 hours to go before midnight's big deadline, so I wanted to make sure you saw my email yesterday. With Congress, the White House, and soon the Supreme Court aligned against us, it's critical the states step up as leaders of the progressive movement. We've made great progress here in Washington state, but we need to continue to grow our progressive strength in the face of unprecedented challenges to our freedoms. With only a few hours left, will you chip in now to grow our movement? We must invest in the work ahead -- together. | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd784d3/2f5ea88d/76cdad91/2cbc38ed/2195223709/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-8-9pm&refcode=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-8-9pm&utm_campaign=july-eom-8-9pm&utm_medium=ema")
---
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Monday, July 30, 2018
Subject: Checks and balances
Dear Friend,
What a month it has been for our democracy.
Congress is about to acquiesce to President Trump's nomination of Brett Kavanaugh, who does not believe sitting presidents should have to undergo criminal investigations when they break the law. Given the president's recent deference to Putin and more evidence emerging of Russian involvement in 2016, this is a serious concern.
Kavanaugh's deference to executive power is a sign that we will no longer be able to rely on the Supreme Court to check and balance a dangerous president. His past anti-choice, anti-immigrant rulings endanger our most basic freedoms. _Roe v. Wade_ is on the chopping block -- as are our voting rights, marriage equality, and so much of our progress. And we can't count on the Republican majority in Congress to do anything about it.
**The situation in our national government is serious. Our system of checks and balances on a rogue president has failed. But that's all the more reason we need to boost the power of the states.**
[**If we can't count on our systems of checks and balances working in D.C., we must strengthen the progressive movement in our states. We're proving the power of progressive ideas to change a state -- be a part of this work by investing $5 today before our July deadline.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd784d3/2f5ea88d/76cdad91/2cbc38ed/2195223709/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-8-9pm&refcode=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-8-9pm&utm_campaign=july-eom-8-9pm&utm_medium=ema")
We've seen a progressive agenda work here in Washington -- that's why we're the #1 state economy in the country. We've made great progress but we must keep moving forward.
While Trump and his extremist allies in D.C. have launched an unprecedented crusade against a woman's right to choose, in Washington state were taking action to protect and promote a pro-choice agenda. That's why we passed the landmark _Reproductive Parity Act_ this year.
While Trump's administration denies asylum seekers and fails to reunite separated families, Washington will always be a state that welcomes newcomers. It's why we sued Trump over his disastrous border policy. We won't back down here, no matter what D.C. or this president does.
Our federal system of checks and balances is broken. Progress is not going to come from the White House, Congress, or the Supreme Court -- which is why we must strengthen our power in the states, and show leadership in these disturbing times. [**Before our end-of-the-month deadline, will you join me on the frontlines of defending our values by investing in the work ahead?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd784d3/2f5ea88d/76cdad91/2cbc38ed/2195223709/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-8-9pm&refcode=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-8-9pm&utm_campaign=july-eom-8-9pm&utm_medium=ema")
This is clearly a call for action for all of us. I hope we can count on you to support our fight.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd784d3/2f5ea88d/76cdad91/2cbc38ed/2195223709/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-8-9pm&refcode=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-8-9pm&utm_campaign=july-eom-8-9pm&utm_medium=ema")

subject: Downright dangerous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoTJqc6AA6kiDslQZXQ7axs_DmfGj8tSC5r64psNzkk=/VfTij0Ow33ku8O4uF2OY4WUvNEvRbXgvSLHBnJFcNyE=) Friends and Neighbors -- As is so often the case these days, I was very disheartened and disgusted to hear the recent news that downloadable blue prints for 3D guns may very soon be available to the public - which would essentially allow anyone with access to a 3D printer to make their very own 'ghost' gun, their very own completely untraceable, unregistered lethal weapon. **[And even worse, this is being sanctioned by the Trump Administration.](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoTJqc6AA6kiDslQZXQ7axs_DmfGj8tSC5r64psNzkk=/5lDC9TR9J4l6PKrWyiR0EF33IK6YRX3t0RwR38u36KQ=)** When it comes to 3D printed guns, I couldn't agree more with Fred Guttenberg, who lost his daughter Jaime to a madman at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. Fred said: "Every American who cares about public safety should be outraged. This administration chose to do this. What it means is that going forward, on planes, in school, in government buildings that guns will not be detectable and put us all at greater risk." This foolishly lenient policy is downright dangerous - **and will only pour more gasoline on the fire of the gun violence epidemic, in our state and in our country.** [Help JR stop 3D guns. Contribute $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoTJqc6AA6kiDslQZXQ7axs_DmfGj8tSC5r64psNzkk=/vfQTgAYMoAYQFJab5b83jqy1jt4OjhmbvGB-4aU5Lys=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thankfully -- as so often has been the case in the Trump era -- the courts stepped in to temporarily stop these blueprints from becoming available. But this makes one thing abundantly clear, **we clearly need more checks and balances in our government.** That's one of the reasons why I got into this race to be your next Chief Financial Officer (CFO), to be a check and balance in the Cabinet, and most importantly, **to make sure YOUR state government is working for you - not the NRA and gun lobby. As your next CFO, I pledge that I would stand up against insane, dangerous policies, like allowing 3D printed guns out into the public, to make an already terrible epidemic that much worse.** But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't get there without your help.** [**Can you contribute $20.18 or more today, to help me stand up to the gun lobby - and bring important checks and balances back to our state government?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoTJqc6AA6kiDslQZXQ7axs_DmfGj8tSC5r64psNzkk=/vfQTgAYMoAYQFJab5b83jqy1jt4OjhmbvGB-4aU5Lys=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

That’s because they are no longer taught the Constitution, or the essentials of American civics. And make no mistake–this is by design, part of the strategy of those on the Left who wish to change our nation in fundamental ways. That's why I’m grateful that you love the Constitution and our country’s founding principles. And that’s why I’d like to offer you [**a special resource on the Constitution today.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjEzLWVlYzMxNjAzZDFkNTRiMTFhN2RlMjFkYTI4OGJkMGVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9saWJlcnR5LWxlYXJuaW5nLXNvY2lldHk_YXBwZWFsX2NvZGU9TUs3MThFTTUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0dPUDMwODAxMThBJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1saWJlcnR5bGVhcm5pbmc&K=_1BKE-TwCBnQYso5Q45Cew) When you join Hillsdale’s new Liberty & Learning Society with a monthly gift of $25 or more, **I will send you an exclusive leather-bound copy of _The U.S. Constitution: A Reader._** This 790-page book contains 113 primary documents relating to the Constitution’s framing and history. More, it gives you readings covering the American founding, Civil War, Progressivism, and the rise of the administrative state. Its 11 sections have introductions from members of Hillsdale’s politics faculty. It’s one of our most sought-after publications, leather-bound for Society members. The White House • August 1, 2018
## The Day Ahead
**•** President Donald J. Trump will meet with pastors from America’s inner cities at the White House. **•** Vice President Mike Pence is in Hawaii, where he will participate in the Honorable Carry Ceremony for the remains of American service members who fell in the Korean War. [**Watch live at 7:15 p.m. ET.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAxLjkzMjIyMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMS45MzIyMjA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyODY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# **Shut out by Obamacare, millions will get relief**
**Obamacare has failed** to provide affordable, flexible healthcare options for millions of Americans. According to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, almost 28 million Americans are without insurance coverage today. **Americans are increasingly being priced out** of Affordable Care Act plans. From 2013 to 2017, insurance premiums more than doubled, shutting out tons of middle-class Americans who don’t get subsidies. **In many communities, options are nonexistent.** More than 52 percent of U.S. counties have just one ACA insurer, forcing residents to choose between pricey insurance or nothing at all. **Today, President Trump** and his Administration are improving healthcare options for all Americans by issuing a final rule on short-term, limited-duration health plans. The new rule allows for the sale and renewal of plans that cover longer periods than the previous maximum of fewer than three months. This rule will increase choices for Americans facing escalating premiums, creating flexible options that are not currently available in the individual market. [Learn more about what the Trump Administration’s new rule means for you. ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAxLjkzMjIyMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMS45MzIyMjA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyODY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-administration-working-provide-flexible-affordable-healthcare-options-americans/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **In case you missed it:** [President Trump’s blueprint to lower drug prices](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAxLjkzMjIyMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMS45MzIyMjA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyODY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-blueprint-lower-drug-prices/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d).
# **Worker pay hits highest level in a decade**
**During the nearly 8 years of “recovery”** that followed the Great Recession under the previous Administration, one key piece of the economic puzzle was missing: significant wage gains for workers. According to new data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics, that’s changed under President Trump. **Wages and salaries rose** 0.5 percent last quarter and 2.8 percent during the 12-month period ending in June, CNBC reports. The employment cost index, which measures compensation to workers, hit its highest level since amid the financial crisis in 2008. **While left-leaning economists** claimed that [slow growth was inevitable](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAxLjkzMjIyMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMS45MzIyMjA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyODY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-economic-agenda-delivering-gdp-growth-dismissed-unrealistic/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d), President Trump said the right policies—tax reform, stronger trade deals, and investment in our workforce—could turn our country around. name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: The attacks continue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

It's happening again.

We know from our intelligence community that Russia interfered with our 2016 elections. And yesterday, Facebook announced that they have identified a coordinated political influence campaign from dozens of fake accounts that bought online ads to divide Americans ahead of the upcoming November elections.

This announcement confirms what we have been saying for months: **we need to protect and secure our elections today before it 's too late. And as you know from the latest revelations, we also need to secure our power grid, our private information, and our bank accounts.**

All of this must happen. But we also must acknowledge that our very democracy is at risk. Congress must immediately pass my bipartisan Honest Ads Act to ensure that online political ads are held to the same rules as those sold on TV and radio -- we need consistent standards for transparency in online political activity so Americans know who is trying to influence them.

And we must pass my bipartisan Secure Elections Act to strengthen election cybersecurity in America and protect against foreign interference in our elections.

**Will you donate today to make sure I can keep fighting for these bills in the Senate?**

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: [Medicare for all] A study and sticker
body:
[1]Bernie Sanders

Our ideas are winning, sisters and brothers.

Earlier this week, a Koch brothers-sponsored study shared widely with the
corporate media tried to scare people into thinking Medicare for all would
be too expensive for our country.

But what the study did was show that Medicare for all would actually save
the American people $2 trillion over 10 years. And it would do so while
providing health care for 30 million Americans who don’t have it today and
eliminating premiums, deductibles and co-payments to private health
insurance companies.

Sounds like a good deal to me.

So I want to thank the Koch brothers. I do not think their study had its
intended effect.

This year, more candidates than ever before are campaigning on the idea
that health care should be a right for every man, woman and child in this
country, and not a privilege. They are campaigning on that issue not just
in places like New York and Vermont, but in Kansas, Texas, and states
traditionally thought of as “red” and “purple.”

And I intend to support them, because they are sure to face unlimited sums
of money from the insurance and drug companies, from Wall Street and the
Koch brothers and from all those fighting to protect their profits and the
status quo. But I cannot do that alone:

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/543?refcode=em180801-full&t=1001&akid=74%2E150750%2E36hQ-P ]Please make a donation — of any amount — to help me spend the rest of
2018 not just campaigning for my re-election, but to elect progressives
everywhere who are campaigning on Medicare for all. Add your donation
today, and we’ll send you this Medicare for all sticker to show your
support for an idea that’s time has come.

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/543?refcode=em180801-full&t=1002&akid=74%2E150750%2E36hQ-P ][IMG]

Medicare for all is an idea that's time has come.

This is no longer a “radical” or a “fringe” idea. The last poll I saw
showed that it is an idea supported by 63 percent of the American people.

And why?

Because people understand that the function of a rational health care
system in this country should be to provide quality care for everyone in a
cost-effective way, not to make health industry CEOs richer or drive up
stock prices on Wall Street.

Let me also be clear that a Medicare-for-all, single-payer health care
system will increase wages and expand employment by lifting a major
financial weight off of the businesses burdened by employee health
expenses.

Americans who are currently in jobs they don't like but must stay put
because of health care access would be free to explore more productive
opportunities as they desire. That is real freedom.

Today the United States remains the only major country on earth not to
guarantee health care to all while spending more per capita than any other
nation. If every major country on earth can do it, please do not tell me
the United States cannot.

So I am going to spend the rest of the year campaigning not just for my
re-election, but for candidates who agree with us on this issue. But I
cannot do it alone:

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/543?refcode=em180801-full&t=1003&akid=74%2E150750%2E36hQ-P ]Please make a donation — of any amount — to help me spend the rest of
2018 not just campaigning for my re-election, but to elect progressives
everywhere who are campaigning on Medicare for all. Add your donation
today, and we’ll send you a Medicare for all sticker.

In this pivotal moment in American history, we must go forward to
guarantee health care as a right and not a privilege. This is a struggle
not just about health care but about the heart and soul of our country,
about what we stand for as a people. And it is a struggle we are winning.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

body:
I wanted to let you know that in August we'll be doing something a little bit different. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek -

Hey - I want to thank you so much for all of your support this past month. This team accomplishes amazing things together every month, and July was no exception.

I wanted to let you know that in August we'll be doing something a little bit different. We'll still send along some updates from our team, thoughts from Tim, and of course we'll work towards a goal to stay on track for our big end-of-quarter deadline in September - but we also wanted to do some reflecting and work towards a non-fundraising goal, together.

[August 11th and 12th](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12cd/3e0906/6e4258e9/3e35377b/405424866/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180801_1_PET_JR_Pledge-1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+August+11th+and+12th&utm_campaign=20180801_1_PET_JR_Pledge-1") will mark one year since white supremacists brought their hate and anger right here to Virginia - threatening the safety of our communities. While the tragic events of Charlottesville took place a year ago, they're certainly not behind us. Similar groups continue to plan dangerous events and demonstrations, and we must remain clear: **Virginia will never stand with hatred.**

[It is with this in mind that we plan to use our grassroots power (that means you!) to stand hundreds of thousands strong against hate in August. If you plan to join us, be the first to sign our pledge here.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12cd/3e0906/6e4258e9/3e35377a/405424866/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180801_1_PET_JR_Pledge-1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+It+is+with+this+in+mind+that+we+plan+to+&utm_campaign=20180801_1_PET_JR_Pledge-1")

[Tomorrow,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12cd/3e0906/6e4258e9/3e353779/405424866/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180801_1_PET_JR_Pledge-1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180801_1_PET_JR_Pledge-1") we will formally launch our campaign to stand against hate and reject it in all of its forms.

But Derek, since you are one of our strongest supporters I wanted to extend to you an early invitation to sign the pledge and get on board.

**I 'm always thinking about tons of goals - dollars raised each month, number of grassroots donors, new folks engaged. But this month, my mind will be on this one new goal: 100,000 people across Virginia and the nation pledging to stand up against hate whenever they see it. With this goal, we're saying that together, we will never, ever stop fighting for a fairer, safer, more inclusive America.**

[Sound good to you, Derek? Click here to sign on early - and make sure you follow along with us this month as we work together towards this grassroots accomplishment.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12cd/3e0906/6e4258e9/3e353778/405424866/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180801_1_PET_JR_Pledge-1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Sound+good+to+you+if+recipientfirstname+&utm_campaign=20180801_1_PET_JR_Pledge-1")

More details to come soon,

_Jess_

---

Peter,

We've endorsed 57 pro-choice Democratic women for the House.

There's no two ways about it: That's a lot of candidates, and each is facing a completely distinct race that presents unique challenges.

From toss-ups to swing districts, all of our women are navigating complicated race dynamics.

And they can't do it alone.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women win their elections and flip the House in November.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4e82/24c69fd9/269a69650/188535ce/3046817740/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180801_email_StateOfRace?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFET02N_digital_email_20180801_StateOfRace_inact&source=WQEFET02N_digital_email_20180801_StateOfRace_inact")**

Here's an inside look at just three of our red-to-blue House races:

**Angie Craig (MN-02)** -- who would be the first openly lesbian mother to serve in the House -- is running in a toss-up race to replace extremist Republican Rep. Jason Lewis, who has lamented not being able to call women "sluts," described natural disaster survivors as "whiners," and said African Americans who receive welfare have "traded one plantation for another." This is a true purple district: Lewis won his seat by only two points in 2016, and Trump won the district by only one point.

**Sharice Davids (KS-03)** has to win a tough primary election this month before she can defeat vulnerable Republican Rep. Kevin Yoder in November. In a district Hillary Clinton won, Sharice would be the first Native American woman in Congress, the first openly gay member of the Kansas congressional delegation, and the first Democratic woman to represent the district.

After her son was shot and killed, **Lucy McBath (GA-06)** became a gun violence prevention and social justice advocate. Now, she's challenging first-term incumbent Rep. Karen Handel, who once wrote a book attacking Planned Parenthood. Trump won this district by only two points in 2016, and after winning her run-off primary election, we know Lucy can take the seat in November.

Angie, Sharice, Lucy, and all of our House candidates need the support of this community in order to build strong campaigns that can win these tough races.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women flip the House:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Women-to-the-House](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4e82/24c69fd9/269a69650/188535cf/3046817740/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180801_email_StateOfRace?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectWomentotheH&utm_campaign=WQEFET02N_digital_email_20180801_StateOfRace_inact&source=WQEFET02N_digital_email_20180801_StateOfRace_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn

There's no two ways about it: That's a lot of candidates, and each is facing a completely distinct race that presents unique challenges. From toss-ups to swing districts, all of our women are navigating complicated race dynamics. And they can't do it alone. "" Here's an inside look at just three of our red-to-blue House races: Angie Craig (MN-02) -- who would be the first openly lesbian mother to serve in the House -- is running in a toss-up race to replace extremist Republican Rep. Jason Lewis, who has lamented not being able to call women "sluts," described natural disaster survivors as "whiners," and said African Americans who receive welfare have "traded one plantation for another." This is a true purple district: Lewis won his seat by only two points in 2016, and Trump won the district by only one point. Sharice Davids (KS-03) has to win a tough primary election this month before she can defeat vulnerable Republican Rep. Kevin Yoder in November. In a district Hillary Clinton won, Sharice would be the first Native American woman in Congress, the first openly gay member of the Kansas congressional delegation, and the first Democratic woman to represent the district. After her son was shot and killed, Lucy McBath (GA-06) became a gun violence prevention and social justice advocate. Now, she's challenging first-term incumbent Rep. Karen Handel, who once wrote a book attacking Planned Parenthood. Trump won this district by only two points in 2016, and after winning her run-off primary election, we know Lucy can take the seat in November. Angie, Sharice, Lucy, and all of our House candidates need the support of this community in order to build strong campaigns that can win these tough races. subject: President Obama just endorsed us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:

| | | Friends - I wanted you to be the first to know: Today, President Barack Obama endorsed our campaign for progress! Here's what President Obama had to say: _"I am so excited to endorse Stacey Abrams for Governor of Georgia. She 's not running a campaign built on division or distraction; she's running to lead one Georgia where everybody has opportunity, and everybody's voice is heard. And she's got the record of building consensus that shows she can deliver - with good jobs, great public education, expanded Medicaid, and secure, affordable health insurance for everyone. In a time when too many folks are focused simply on how to win an election, Stacey's somebody who cares about something more important: why we should. That's the kind of politics we should practice. That's why I'm proud to give Stacey Abrams my support."_ **[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa969/34a064cc/a6ecb71/70ea1d1/2502393975/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAxMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obama-abrams?refcode=IE080118-full")** I am so humbled to have President Obama's endorsement in our critical race. He knows that with only three months until Election Day, we all need to stand united for progress - starting right here in Georgia. **[Will you join President Barack Obama and contribute $5 to our people-powered campaign?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa969/34a064cc/a6ecb71/70ea1d1/2502393975/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAxMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obama-abrams?refcode=IE080118-full")** President Obama doesn't publicly endorse every Democrat who runs for office, especially not this early. But he understands that our campaign will affect Georgia families in every way, from Medicaid expansion to excellent public schools, criminal justice reform to good jobs. **We still have a lot of work to do between now and November, but we know how we'll win:** Team Abrams, with your help, is going to spend smarter, work harder, and win this election by turning out the voters we need to close the gap and take our state forward. That's how we won our primary by more than 50 points. Imagine what we can accomplish in November if we all step up right now. **If you stand with me and President Obama - and you are committed to the fight for progress, equality, and opportunity - please chip in to support our historic voter outreach effort:** **[http://secure.staceyabrams.com/JoinObama](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa969/34a064cc/a6ecb71/70ea1d1/2502393975/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAxMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obama-abrams?refcode=IE080118-full")** Today, President Obama is with us. He knows first-hand that progress isn't always easy - but it is always worth fighting for. Thank you for fighting with us. Now, let's get to work. Stacey Abrams

Speaker Gingrich has been the go-to spokesman for conservative values for years. He has championed more conservative reforms than I can count, and....

Friend,

I just received word that former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich has officially endorsed my campaign. I wanted to make sure you heard the news before anyone else.

This is a big deal, friend. Speaker Gingrich has been the go-to spokesman for conservative values for years. He has championed more conservative reforms than I can count, and is a key ally of President Trump.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b3867deb713342fb9cc6048599352c9d&_e=sdXJea7yhtcluOpJ7W7dM5jEQ_fK9q0CN7uf5LJQBB5BUd25nQ3fcwmy1NZta_HL67slRBEbpJqK9vTOLTdE_WE49SspOxV6Cr2K8O98HTaZOiTR1bBoprcwtMFohsHpJQQG-RCwRjeEozKaoQOlokXxuAiiiHOyu5qf2QRB33gR31mqCSpZ-0f39J77vurP4fs6iI2ZR4uHNRZtrQrZNpM4gVBUoPf6UrjKnWpukrFR-LEzH6YCC9N-b4Cx2W66ReSPKhcbfI2DoYrJFjosmC_9QQ8ugvv98iwn6azfbllXekfZzVyS15qtjSsIgmnLTDmsEd_h_g3MCRXSzSw2nUfhz5JV-lSMubHDHSHQ_hNb5GmXh6p23wqkJgDxIJqebW2RxlapbrP6lBQodA65kNRSKDi_Rpf3GZwx2__7uwU%3D)

Now that Speaker Gingrich is on board, I need to prove to him that I'm the real deal. To do so, I'm asking you to take action RIGHT NOW and [**chip in to my Emergency Response Fund.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b3867deb713342fb9cc6048599352c9d&_e=sdXJea7yhtcluOpJ7W7dM5jEQ_fK9q0CN7uf5LJQBB5BUd25nQ3fcwmy1NZta_HL67slRBEbpJqK9vTOLTdE_WE49SspOxV6Cr2K8O98HTaZOiTR1bBoprcwtMFohsHpJQQG-RCwRjeEozKaoQOlokXxuAiiiHOyu5qf2QRB33gR31mqCSpZ-0f39J77vurPl1JkfWlJm3vR0XXNwwdWhAUzJgwrIaj531dilyhub6r8P4nNQdp-v1lsUBIGkgsau8m5Iz1NsIAgrwZF56Tvm33BlJU8CGneU3kSkZzvQsey1pTsu8btrIiA-GnHIVzGkk_IAUVjCaYdJbYp-bq_lgsyRqB2gfb42li9Trsr-jGil_cS9MCKOyGqYqLoqm7fp_kCBQcKUwLfx0EPt_gMV_2w4oBn2_hrkjY3qQrfd2g%3D)

I want to show Speaker Gingrich the sheer number of Wisconsinites who are ready to fight for the values he and I have defended for years. I want to show we're ready to respond to any attack on what we believe. And I want to show him soon.

[I'M READY TO FIGHT FOR OUR VALUES](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b3867deb713342fb9cc6048599352c9d&_e=sdXJea7yhtcluOpJ7W7dM5jEQ_fK9q0CN7uf5LJQBB5BUd25nQ3fcwmy1NZta_HL67slRBEbpJqK9vTOLTdE_WE49SspOxV6Cr2K8O98HTaZOiTR1bBoprcwtMFohsHpJQQG-RCwRjeEozKaoQOlokXxuAiiiHOyu5qf2QRB33gR31mqCSpZ-0f39J77vurP_lt4mPXGlro8eeOQtswhrHFkTk727RcDCs8Pi8DzhItw1AfBGkj8amAxEiAiVpYBzDTFnsy5BWZ42IrTXX7F7TNoPRqWG9RdCpDm3PSgLKpDgRaggjKW1t79B6Ye6H-YDFf7dh6J8qF0lzEsDgvwa-NTkk4X8xLls9iOfdRBO4EBwRudsMmvZDN1UoJUBW5h6JFIqwG2fUlLk1P6BLRUdN9PMHd5XaYZ3uhT8RI3MTU%3D)
---

The fact that Speaker Gingrich is supporting my campaign is further proof that I'm the only true conservative in this race. President Trump needs more fighters in the U.S. Senate, and you can count on me.

I hope you'll join Speaker Gingrich in supporting my big plans for Wisconsin, and show the nation that we're ready for anything.

-Leah

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b3867deb713342fb9cc6048599352c9d&_e=sdXJea7yhtcluOpJ7W7dM4s9GXVoxIeXl76Q124xHoDn-dGCz17PrBT5DNXCJh2763xj0mY4D14yKxhiivFMcUeYI6ZnhM1WaBx9Hd_a-b641OxMKJksHyvwdNsf4XBQ4lF0kLKfg3DmSkUZtksBUoH_SW11lPBKRjZye8_9FGUselXCgQVsDKDpldQk2eC4A-q31zzgqITfdWNIpIpqjaN7jaSBUWrhu4-At1dWBmxMVYrMUOV87YsYby2uFI8qSYw7KoKwaysIKPzV493OMgw7P97IitBodMFML_zo1yLZfhUeAHUmMA6ZQmsr93V8JWC6KuIhG9Hk0Mp56M195oLuI9C-pdS4ziqOI7qr2bb3QD7APgWIVRQLJKmAHbh3) that you care about? So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b3867deb713342fb9cc6048599352c9d&_e=sdXJea7yhtcluOpJ7W7dM4s9GXVoxIeXl76Q124xHoAR8Kuiwjf1dwwxbNUPG-UAzI0l3e1ZsPPLqH_lu1_O1wMG2WCGEy19ihSSLVJvL9oc9v_2qd17Tuk1lWWi-J4OxsfEd6gOyjMtBobGFZ4p6Huz3BFJSyE6OpTopv8czYjPJVgjDZL05sGaLtIBw7-7WEy27jDIT94O7a_pAIDhzSZWNVKSbxJytA2hQD4IFKEhFLqURBxJSyQ21aOgJSYmKxTUVmanAEl4jdY__vIaVJdf0NHF5Lh_e7AQQcI6IoCDv6oWjhLR9EtNBNA8LbdyHj_G6V43e224ECrWghja-Rob1nuc-Kqi6EARCrgFVBjvIHhsL9XEGmrvgjmZN30m) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b3867deb713342fb9cc6048599352c9d&_e=sdXJea7yhtcluOpJ7W7dM_GZd7Wi4VhQGy_P_Z8B1Cw0D9e5CH8U-QN8OcbDQn0WRVENljq1Wg13NVAOrcIPtsTipI2E_aGOSHzym4qio8qg5lCjmLsb5NMaY655m0FOkdYZckojCZ1TQQlGljBqXqnEYZSULluBMr8V7dZIbaOJK8Zq-eI8Q_kiVAFgGPCxlm3JqwrMyxIoyYvH5T_5tbfvALpVftsDoxHAiOA0o7cBD2tAn-sFiIFZgfF9DzFt2wDH2VdIApPwQdeuKySNbg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b3867deb713342fb9cc6048599352c9d&_e=sdXJea7yhtcluOpJ7W7dM0OeSvvhy6Wl8-Sa150A5mH2Lsa6j0N5bTbzXU9gPzW1lpZmof7kp3liLMPOzxsANXzwDZ7ciOKwu4HzyJOBxYSX30YsehFnevvdHBYpYXOcRieTgc86wq3aaVML-wRS9AFtTygu_b9fA2a96frPtv88K5SNhuTycHj8EmZBcMwisHt7Q1B12UCTw8m5YSwb13R0pFZ3LwRp-ijaI1bEsVHtQ0s2tLuj6sTP7a7dn8gM-nKlPs6NZVITYlXorn6azA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b3867deb713342fb9cc6048599352c9d&_e=sdXJea7yhtcluOpJ7W7dM588FdSiFhlLzMw19NaZqM565a0-YkccwJ2E5t0qWnOZKtyO3JeHHCNfzfdne4vq_W9MhaftVrUZYYRYSGSk72ue2Eq2e0dKsY-emqtxhBE9oVFpKxxiCSnlLXWioe64cSPKIgnmrXlnYh52uvPvEvg40Vha3GfuJhL3M5nWwy5la1F1HtCRkrd09WZNW-7hkUXlQb5eG1NH9ScJpGwsm0HyMg3MFQIdSRtxZMhYTmok3EO5PkYnz6tuQxsmLYAacQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. | | | **_ONE-CLICK POLL:_** Do you approve of Betsy DeVos' decision to eliminate accountability for colleges that defraud their students AND make it harder to forgive student loans for fraud victims? | [**YES**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2f04/7377f838/3a1bd1a7/51f9bd49/4126703642/VEsH/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/JZ7LKBP")

**Peter -- Betsy DeVos has spent her first 18 months in government stacking the Department of Education with former for-profit college executives and blocking rules that would make loan forgiveness more available to students defrauded by for-profit institutions. And unfortunately, she 's just getting started.**

DeVos and her team of for-profit insiders are now writing a _new_ set of rules that will **ELIMINATE accountability for shady for-profit colleges while making it HARDER for debt-ridden students who were defrauded by for-profit institutions to have their loans forgiven!**

**And here 's the worst part: they're bringing back "pre-dispute arbitration agreements," which is a fancy way of saying that now students can't sue their colleges in court if they find out they've been defrauded.**

This hits close to home, Peter. Thousands of Hoosier students, including many veterans, were left out to dry when ITT Tech closed. **Students were often left with _tens of thousands of dollars_ in student loan debt, no degree, and no help in sight.**

**When Joe talks about the system being rigged against hardworking Hoosiers who play by the rules, this is EXACTLY what he means. The Department of Education should be working to protect vulnerable students, not aid and abet predatory institutions out to cash tuition checks while failing to deliver on the quality education they promised! That 's why Joe wants to hear from you. [Will you take our quick one-click poll and let us know whether you approve of Betsy DeVos' actions?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2f04/7377f838/3a1bd1a7/51f9bd49/4126703642/VEsF/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/JZ7LKBP")**

---
Thanks,
Team Donnelly

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Thank you (and an update!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | This isn't a message asking for money, a signature, or anything else Peter. This message has one purpose, and one purpose only: **To say thank you.** July was our biggest month yet. **We reached our $650,000 goal -- with an average online contribution of just $26.** I am truly humbled and honored by the awe-inspiring commitment you continue to show to this campaign. With less than 100 days until Election Day, Team Sherrod is full-speed ahead. Here are a few highlights of what we've been up to: **We launched Veterans and Military Families for Sherrod.** I will never stop working to make sure we give Ohio servicemembers and their loved ones the support they deserve. | [](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff851/4462dc26/6f838088/20076521/2935060831/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180801?refcode=sbe180801_m")
---
**We fought for workers and fair wages.** Americans deserve better than outsourcing, low wages, and poor working conditions. That's why I'm fighting like hell every day in the Senate, _and why I need you to join me._
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff851/4462dc26/6f838088/20076521/2935060831/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180801?refcode=sbe180801_m")
---
**We fought for affordable, accessible healthcare** at a series of events holding my opponent, Congressman Jim Renacci, accountable for his dangerous healthcare record.
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff851/4462dc26/6f838088/20076521/2935060831/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180801?refcode=sbe180801_m")
---
**Our team is closing in on 100,000 contributions.** And, Colleen, a grassroots supporter from Cleveland, chipped in $10 and won a chance to see _Hamilton_ with me. (Of course, _Hamilton_ was spectacular!)
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff851/4462dc26/6f838088/20076521/2935060831/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180801?refcode=sbe180801_m")
---
**We settled the great debate:** Yes, a hot dog is a sandwich.
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff851/4462dc26/6f838088/20076521/2935060831/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180801?refcode=sbe180801_m")
---
We have less than 100 days left until Ohioans go to the polls on Election Day. And as long as we keep up this level of grassroots activism, I know we will come out ahead -- no matter what attacks come our way.
There is plenty of work left to do. But for today, let's take just a moment to celebrate our achievements. We couldn't do this without you.
With gratitude,
Sherrod
| | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff851/4462dc26/6f838088/20076521/2935060831/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180801?refcode=sbe180801_m")
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: I can't ever thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is what you did.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a772/c1f7015/6aee6efb/1142610c/3533361803/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180801_em&refcode2=logo") Friend, I wanted to take a minute to personally thank you for being a part of this campaign. I know we send you a lot of emails, and ask you to give often (and really it's the last thing I want to be doing), but we do it because it's important. Senate campaigns are more expensive than ever -- there are super PACs, dark money organizations, and special interests coming at us from every direction. And the only reason our campaign can compete with all this money is you. You and the thousands of people reading this right now are part of a team that is showing we can defeat special interests and dark money with small grassroots contributions. Just this month, because of your contributions, we were able to reach tens of thousands of voters across Minnesota; hire more staff to build this campaign; organize hundreds of volunteers to make calls, knock on doors, and join us at events; and keep our ads on air before our primary on August 14th. **That 's what you did -- and you're the reason we can win this race. ** $10 and $20 at a time we are building a special campaign with thousands of grassroots contributions from progressives like you who care about our environment, want to build a fair economy that works for all of us, and are ready to fight with everything we have to stop Trump's agenda -- and his nominee for the Supreme Court. We'll send more emails with more asks to contribute because it's important, but I want you to know how much I value everything you do and everything you give. Whether it's $1 or $100 -- I can't ever thank you enough. Tina [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a772/c1f7015/6aee6efb/1142610d/3533361803/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180801_em&refcode2=btn")

* Two straight years with no new taxes or fees in the general fund (first time ever!);
* Two straight years of level residential property tax rates;
* Prevented $71 million in projected property taxes;
* Cut income tax rates across the board and eliminated the tax on Social Security benefits for nearly 40,000 seniors — saving Vermonters $30 million;
* Made the largest investment in housing for working families;
* And so much more!

The Governor articulated some of the progress we’ve made, including: Two straight years with no new taxes or fees in the general fund (first time ever!); Two straight years of level residential property tax rates; Prevented $71 million in projected property taxes; Cut income tax rates across the board and eliminated the tax on Social Security benefits for nearly 40,000 seniors — saving Vermonters $30 million; Made the largest investment in housing for working families; And so much more! He is clearly the only candidate in the race who can effectively build on this progress, and make Vermont a more affordable, prosperous state for us all. See for yourself!
